decision: Seven-platform enterprise ecosystem with strict bounded contexts

platforms.responsibility: Sitio corporativo, marketing, SEO, landing pages, formularios publicos y captacion de leads.
Reclutamiento, candidatos, entrevistas, evaluaciones, contrataciones, expedientes y documentacion.
Operacion diaria, agenda operativa, tareas, productividad, supervision y reportes operativos.
Administracion central, finanzas, tesoreria, auditoria, usuarios, roles, permisos, integraciones y BI.
Clientes nuevos, clientes activos, seguimiento, morosos, cartera vencida, promesas de pago, conversaciones, campanas y auditoria de contacto.
Autenticacion, autorizacion, RBAC, API client, SDK, tipos, validadores, hooks, utilities, design system, iconos y eventos compartidos.
Cerebro de control total: KPIs globales, alertas, monitoreo, centro de agentes, reglas de negocio, auditoria inteligente, riesgos y orquestacion aprobada.

crossPlatformRules: Every platform must consume identity, RBAC, theme, shared types and API contracts from HD-CORE.
HD-BRAIN may observe and recommend across platforms, but executable actions require explicit policy and audit trail.
HD-CRM is the only platform allowed to initiate customer follow-up or collections conversations.
HD-ADMIN is the only platform allowed to manage global users, roles and permissions.
HEAVENLY-DREAMS-WEB-2026 must not store sensitive business data in browser storage for production.
